name: Crazy Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, cocoa, salt, and sugar.
2. Add the shortening or oil, vanilla, vinegar, and water to the dry ingredients. Mix well until smooth.
3. Pour the batter into an ungreased 11-inch x 9-inch pan.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-45 minutes.
5. Allow the cake to cool in the pan before removing it.
6. Frost with your favorite frosting.
